Matched
0 AND 25
1 AND 36

3 I 0
4 I 1
5 I 2
6 I 3
7 I 4

Applying to 10000001
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 AND 25 = AND(I 2,I 5) = AND(0,0) = 0
1 AND 36 = AND(I 3,I 6) = AND(0,0) = 0
2 AND 47 = AND(I 4,I 7) = AND(0,1) = 0
3 I 0 = 1
4 I 1 = 0
5 I 2 = 0
6 I 3 = 0
7 I 4 = 0

\boxed{00010000}
